panels.description: Faithfulness histogram observations from the DeepEval suite. Recorded once per faithfulness case via the shared OTel Meter API instrument (grace_decompression_faithfulness). Observations carry ontology_module / phase_state / sample_batch_id labels (D151 _init filters applied). NO-DATA is the expected state on a fresh deployment until the first eval-suite run.
panels.title: Faithfulness — p50 / p95 per ontology_module

panels.description: MINE retention ratio observable gauge. Populated by the MINE emitter's set_mine_retention_observation() callback after each MINE-sample API call. NO-DATA before the first MINE run. _init filters per D151.
panels.title: MINE Retention Ratio

panels.description: Per-metric mean score over time, sourced from deepeval_results joined to eval_runs. One series per metric_name (5 metrics).

targets.rawSql: SELECT eval_runs.started_at AS time, deepeval_results.metric_name AS metric, AVG(deepeval_results.metric_score) AS value FROM deepeval_results JOIN eval_runs ON eval_runs.id = deepeval_results.run_id WHERE eval_runs.started_at > $__timeFrom() AND eval_runs.started_at < $__timeTo() GROUP BY eval_runs.started_at, deepeval_results.metric_name ORDER BY eval_runs.started_at;

panels.title: Per-metric Mean Score

panels.description: Eval run pass counts over time: cases passing the warn floor and the fail floor. Both series stable at total_cases is the green baseline. A drop in passed_warn_floor (with passed_fail_floor still at total_cases) means recalibrate per docs/eval-runbook.md.

targets.rawSql: SELECT eval_runs.started_at AS time, eval_runs.passed_warn_floor AS passed_warn, eval_runs.passed_fail_floor AS passed_fail, eval_runs.total_cases AS total FROM eval_runs WHERE eval_runs.started_at > $__timeFrom() AND eval_runs.started_at < $__timeTo() ORDER BY eval_runs.started_at;

panels.title: Eval Run Pass Counts

panels.description: Per-run total_cases. Stable line means the golden dataset is stable; changes here imply a dataset edit per the runbook 'adding cases' workflow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT eval_runs.started_at AS time, eval_runs.total_cases AS value FROM eval_runs WHERE eval_runs.started_at > $__timeFrom() AND eval_runs.started_at < $__timeTo() ORDER BY eval_runs.started_at;

panels.title: Eval Suite Case Count

panels.description: Latest 1 eval_run row with status, total_cases, pass counts, and config / golden hashes. Use this to check the most recent suite outcome at a glance.

targets.rawSql: SELECT eval_runs.started_at, eval_runs.completed_at, eval_runs.status, eval_runs.total_cases, eval_runs.passed_warn_floor, eval_runs.passed_fail_floor, eval_runs.config_hash, eval_runs.golden_dataset_hash, eval_runs.triggered_by FROM eval_runs ORDER BY eval_runs.started_at DESC LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Latest Eval Run
